BS_8680.title: Water quality — Code of practice for the design, installation, testing and maintenance of services providing potable water

HTM_04_01.title: Safe water in healthcare premises — Part B: Operational management

ACOP_L8.title: Legionnaires Disease — The control of Legionella bacteria in water systems

HSG_274_Part2.title: Legionnaires disease — Part 2: The control of Legionella bacteria in hot and cold water systems
HSG_274_Part2.biofilm_remediation: Thermal disinfection (70°C for 1 hour) or chlorination

steps: Record inlet hot and cold temperatures
Set TMV to nominal outlet temperature
Measure mixed outlet temperature after 1 minute of flow
Test failsafe: isolate cold — outlet must shut off or drop below 46°C within 5 seconds
Test failsafe: isolate hot — outlet must shut off
